name: flow/flow-story
description: A scripted, sequenced, looping flow animation — walks a graph step by step with fade-in captions.

meta.name: FlowStory
meta.description: A scripted, sequenced, looping flow animation — walks a graph step by step with fade-in captions.

props.name: edges
props.description: The edges to render at each step.

props.name: script
props.description: Ordered steps: { from, to, label? } or { edge, reverse? }.

props.name: loop
props.description: When true, navigation wraps around from end to start.

props.name: stepDuration
props.description: How long (ms) each step is shown during playback.

props.name: stepGap
props.description: Extra pause after each step before advancing (ms) — makes the story easier to follow.

props.name: playing
props.description: Whether the story is currently playing (controlled).

props.name: onStepChange
props.description: Called with the new step index when it changes.

props.name: autoPlay
props.description: When true, starts playback automatically on mount.

props.name: interactive
props.description: A storyline is a view by default — set true to allow selecting/dragging/connecting.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

examples.title: A request/response storyboard
examples.description: A<->B-->C: animate A→B, B→A, A→B, B→C, looping — each step fades in its caption.

examples.title: A linear pipeline
examples.description: Each stage animates and is captioned in turn.

whenToUse: Explaining how a flow works step by step, not just showing a static diagram
Onboarding, architecture walkthroughs, and request/response narratives
whenNotToUse: A static or freely-explorable graph — use <Flow>
A single always-on animated edge — set animated on a FlowEdge

antiPatterns.bad: A requestAnimationFrame loop to sequence steps
antiPatterns.good: A currentStep signal advanced by a timer in useSignalEffect
antiPatterns.why: CLAUDE.md bans the useEffect-style loop; the signal+timer idiom is deterministic + testable.

related.name: Flow
related.reason: Renders the graph the storyline animates.

related.name: FlowEdge
related.reason: Reuses the animated-edge keyframe per step.

intent.a11yRationale: The caption is an aria-live region announced each step; play/pause/prev/next make it keyboard-operable; travel motion is disabled under prefers-reduced-motion while captions are preserved.

flexibility.note: Serializable steps — { from, to } or { edge, reverse }.
